description: Create detailed work plan

# Ghostwire: Workflows Plan

Create detailed work plan.

## Process

1. Understand Goal
   - What to achieve
   - Constraints
   - Timeline

2. Break Down Work
   - Major tasks
   - Subtasks
   - Dependencies

3. Estimate
   - Effort per task
   - Timeline
   - Resources needed

4. Document Plan
   - Task list
   - Milestones
   - Success criteria
